description.value: You have experience surviving in some of the most extreme situations in the galaxy. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Forager] skill feat. In addition, you can perform other downtime activities while you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Subsist] as long as they're feasible in your environment, such as finding raw materials to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Craft] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Earn Income]{Earning Income} using Survival by live streaming your foraging.
